s-spec-goals-non-goals: Vectorization and tweaking must be done with two images: original vs vectorized and vectorized 1 vs vectorized 2 (or three images, maybe, or "hold to see original" button).
s-spec-2: About local settings persistence, we can talk about last used or save/load profiles. About API, that could come with future AI/premium accounts. We should also add some basic image editing tools. For example, crop or resize. Always the best practices, usual tools style or keyboard shortcuts, etc. will be used. So a crop or rotate tool must be visually quickly accessible and easily recognizable.
s-spec-option-b-both-modes-together-one: This is the one: same tool, but silhouette has a palette of 1 color. It can have a shortcut (1, 2, multiple colors) but it's the same tool. The tool must be able to choose multiple palette sizes automatically: 1, 2, 3, 4, 8, 16... We'll see it later. Also, detail level and contrast is important. For example, a watermark can be skipped by increasing image interpretation contrast.
